release_notes: v0.5.3 — Fix copy button, add message copy, fix thought blocks UI, restore GEN steps.

changes.note: Force-kill gateway process during Windows update to prevent file locks.
Hardened Windows update batch script to wait longer and use xcopy correctly.
Bumped packaged update manifest to v0.5.3.
Fixed thought blocks toggle layout (toggle inside div, not label).
Thought block hide/collapse support, copy message button, data-raw-content.
Restored GEN process steps, data-raw-content for streamed bubbles.
Render GEN steps in history, data-raw-content, thought block settings persistence.
Fixed copyCode with fallback, added copyMessage function.
Added btn-copy-msg styles for message copy button.
